steps.explain:
The three pairs are \((-1,-7)\), \((0,4)\), \((1,15)\). Check each table:
  • A: shows \(-1\to7\) — wrong, \(g(-1)=-7\), not 7 — eliminated.
  • B: shows \(-1\to-4\) — wrong — eliminated.
  • C: shows \(-1\to-7\), \(0\to4\), \(1\to15\) — all match. That matches choice C — C is correct.
  • D: shows \(-1\to-11\) — wrong — eliminated.
